debug_info.goal:
case refine_2
ι : Type u_2
G : ι → Type u_3
inst✝¹ : Fintype ι
inst✝ : (i : ι) → Group (G i)
A : (i : ι) → Set (G i)
K : ι → ℝ
hA : ∀ (i : ι), IsApproximateSubgroup (K i) (A i)
F : (i : ι) → Finset (G i)
hF : ∀ (i : ι), ↑(F i).card ≤ K i
hFS : ∀ (i : ι), A i ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(F i) • A i
⊢ Set.univ.pi A ^ 2 ⊆ ↑(Fintype.piFinset F) • Set.univ.pi A

proof:
intro f hf
      simp_all +decide [Set.mem_smul_set, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ_pi,
        Set.mem_mul, pow_two]
      obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, rfl⟩ := hf
      choose g hg using fun i => hFS i (Set.mul_mem_mul (hx i) (hy i))
      exact ⟨g, fun i => (hg i).1,
        fun i => (hg i).2.choose,
        fun i => (hg i).2.choose_spec.1,
        funext fun i => (hg i).2.choose_spec.2⟩
successful_attempts:
intro f hf
      simp_all +decide [Set.mem_smul_set, Set.mem_pi, Set.mem_univ_pi,
        Set.mem_mul, pow_two]
      obtain ⟨x, hx, y, hy, rfl⟩ := hf
      choose g hg using fun i => hFS i (Set.mul_mem_mul (hx i) (hy i))
      exact ⟨g, fun i => (hg i).1,
        fun i => (hg i).2.choose,
        fun i => (hg i).2.choose_spec.1,
        funext fun i => (hg i).2.choose_spec.2⟩
